name: test/composer-local-dep
description: Minimal local dependency for the composer-postinstall fixture. Required because composer install/update with an empty `require` skips dispatching most lifecycle events — making the test a tautology that passes regardless of hardening. The sibling fixture also declares all three of post-install-cmd/post-update-cmd/post-autoload-dump for the same reason (composer install without a lock routes through update, firing the latter two, not the first).
